## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error '...'

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Logs / Screenshots
If applicable, add terminal log outputs or screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment Details
- OS: [e.g. macOS Sonoma]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.11.2]
- Ollama Version / Model: [e.g. Ollama 0.1.48 / qwen2.5:7b]
- ECIP Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
